title: rubus × hirsutiramus
intro: Rubus × hirsutiramus, also known as the hybrid blackberry or Himalayan blackberry, is a cross between the Himalayan blackberry (Rubus armeniacus) and the blackberry (Rubus fruticosus). The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus × hirsutiramus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost immune function, and alleviate digestive issues. This plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be consumed or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
